specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running Season After Season
content.about:
Welcome to Ben's Boatworks, a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition no matter the season. We offer a comprehensive range of specialized marine services and have built a solid reputation among boat owners who need reliable, knowledgeable help they can count on.

At Ben's Boatworks, we handle everything from thorough boat surveying and inspection to diving and underwater services, marine AC and climate control, and marine plumbing and sanitation. Whether you need a pre-purchase survey before buying a new vessel, underwater hull work without hauling out, a malfunctioning marine air conditioning system diagnosed and repaired, or a complete overhaul of your onboard plumbing and sanitation systems, we bring the expertise and hands-on experience to get the job done right.

We serve boat owners across South Florida and the surrounding waters within a 60-mile radius of Annapolis, MD. We understand that your boat represents a significant investment — in money, in time, and in the lifestyle you've built around it. That's why we approach every job with the same care and attention to detail we'd want for our own vessel. From Chesapeake Bay day sailors to offshore cruisers, our clients trust us to show up prepared and deliver honest, quality work.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving, marine AC & plumbing services. Serving South Florida. Call us today!

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: A professional boat survey provides a detailed assessment of a vessel's structural integrity, mechanical systems, and overall condition — essential for pre-purchase decisions, insurance requirements, or peace of mind before a long passage. Our inspections cover hull, deck, rigging, electrical, and safety equipment so you have a complete picture of what you're working with.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Underwater diving services allow hull inspections, propeller checks, zinc replacement, and line or debris removal without the time and expense of hauling out. Our dive work keeps vessels operational and helps catch fouling, damage, or corrosion before it becomes a costly repair.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Marine air conditioning and climate control systems require specialized knowledge to diagnose, service, and repair correctly — saltwater environments are hard on components and fittings. We service seawater cooling circuits, compressors, blower units, and refrigerant systems to keep your onboard climate comfortable and your equipment running efficiently.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: Onboard plumbing and sanitation systems include freshwater supply, bilge systems, holding tanks, through-hulls, and marine heads — all of which demand proper installation and regular maintenance to function safely and stay compliant. We troubleshoot leaks, replace failing components, and upgrade sanitation systems to keep your vessel clean and seaworthy.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full vessel condition inspection
Underwater hull cleaning and zinc anode replacement without haul-out
Marine air conditioning system diagnosis, repair, and seasonal service
Holding tank and marine head replacement or sanitation system upgrade
Through-hull fitting inspection and seacock service or replacement
Propeller inspection and debris removal via professional dive service
Freshwater system troubleshooting and onboard plumbing repair
